continuity_policy.final_router_state_after_sequence: no active pack currently routed; live prepared-handoff reconciliation pack closed through Gate 255
pack_stop_conditions: prepared handoff source missing or corrupt

leaves.title: Reconcile the live repo against the prepared handoff tree
leaves.objective: Import lawful prepared repo-tree state through Gates 236-254, defer the prepared AGENTS import explicitly, and close Gate 255 truthfully after bounded proof.
leaves.workflow_intent_assertion: This leaf is a live repo reconciliation leaf, not a historical replay leaf. It imports file-state truth from the prepared handoff and records one new truthful live reconciliation gate.
vocabulary_terms_checked: latest closed pack retained as evidence
owned_scope_units: prepared handoff unpack and manifest classification
bulk repo-tree import excluding deferred/non-authoritative surfaces
ordered_actions: Inspect the live repo and staged prepared tree before mutation.
Record added, modified, adapted, deferred, and conflict-classified surfaces in the import manifest.
Import prepared repo-tree content while excluding AGENTS.md, external sidecar material, router surfaces, and planned live-truth test adaptations.
Rewrite the live router quartet and Gate 255 pack surfaces truthfully.
Run only the bounded proof slice required by the imported blast radius and Gate 255 closeout.
allowed_fallout_repairs: adapt imported governance tests that assume the deferred AGENTS state
accept later-state tolerance changes such as the prepared Gate 134 planning-test widening
forbidden_actions: Do not import the prepared .git history.
Do not fabricate a numbered GitHub/ChatGPT interactions doctrine file.
Do not silently edit the prepared AGENTS.md into a local compromise state.
Do not widen to unrelated repo cleanup.
stop_conditions: prepared handoff source missing or corrupt
additional semantic conflict on doctrine/control surfaces
expected_evidence: import manifest written before repo-tree copy
contradiction report records AGENTS deferral explicitly
router quartet closes together on the Gate 255 branch
bounded pytest slices record green results
definition_of_done: prepared repo-tree content through Gate 254 is present in the live repo except for explicitly deferred surfaces
AGENTS.md remains unchanged and the deferment is recorded in repo truth
PLANS.md, the gate map, the leaves ledger, and the execution log agree on Gate 255 closeout
leaves.packaging_requirement: GitHub branch and commit history are the default closeout evidence. Push the work branch after proof passes. Merge to main only if the reconciled governance rule explicitly permits it.
reporting_requirements: merge decision and merge SHA if any
